title: Government response to resale of live events tickets consultation: analytical note
body: "The government ran a consultation on the resale of ticket for live events from 10 January to 4 April 2025.  This analytical note presents the evidence used to produce the estimates included in the DBT press release published on 19 November 2025.  ​This is an ad-hoc analytical release and does not constitute an Official Statistics or National Statistics release.  "
